sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναδίδωμι

- Transliteration: Anadidomi

- Phonetic: an-ad-eed'-om-ee

- Definition:

1. to give forth, send up, so the earth producing plants, yielding fruit etc.

2. to deliver up, hand over

- Origin: from G303 and G1325

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G1325; to hand over: - deliver.
